channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FAA lifts El Paso flight restrictions, allowing flights to resume
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration issued temporary flight restrictions.

item.title: LIVE: Attorney General Bondi testifies before House Judiciary Committee
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: FAA closes airspace around El Paso, Texas, for 10 days, grounding all flights
Investigators searching a location in Arizona in disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
item.description: Officials say a person has been detained for questioning in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie. The Pima County Sheriffâs Department said in a stateme...

item.title: See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: WATCH: Monks on a mission walk 2,300 miles from Texas to DC
item.description: A group of Buddhist monks bearing a message of peace walked into the heart of Washington, D.C., on Tuesday and were greeted by large, joyful crowds as...

item.title: Watch Live: Bondi testifies at House hearing amid scrutiny over Epstein files
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi is appearing before the House Judiciary Committee as the Justice Department faces questions over the Epstein files.

item.title: El Paso airspace closure was tied to Mexican cartel drones, officials say
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration changed course and said flights would resume after halting all air traffic into and out of El Paso.

item.title: Team USA wins gold and silver in women's moguls at Winter Olympics
item.description: Gold medalist Elizabeth Lemley is making her Winter Olympics debut at the Milan Cortina Games.

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: February 11, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a home or refinance your current one? These are the mortgage interest rates you need to know now.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie investigation live updates: Person detained and released
item.description: More than a week after the suspected abduction of the mother of "Today" show anchor Savannah Guthrie, authorities detained and released a person after...

item.title: WATCH: Real-life Lassie helps find missing boy
item.description: Officers in Louisville, Kentucky, were frantically looking for a 3-year-old boy when a neighborhood dog wandered over and led them to the missing boy.

item.title: FBI search of Georgia election offices relied on years-old claims of fraud, affidavit shows
